descriptionHtml:
Neel 51 for sale 2023 | EXCELLENT CONDITION | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

FULLY EQUIPPED (Autopilot, Radar, Solar Panel, Fresh Water Maker, Internet, AC, Air Compressor, Inverter, Underwater Lights, Tender, Dishwasher, Washing Machine...)

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a Neel 51 for sale 2023 - This vessel is a rare opportunity to make a true masterpiece of sailboat design yours. It is a fast, safe and luxurious bluewater trimaran equipped with a whole bunch of extras during construction and upgraded subsequently by the owners. It is the second last of its production series and therefore technically matured and functionally perfected ensuring no hassle with teething problems. This Neel 51 for sale 2023 offers easy handling during navigation and a lot of luxurious living space making your experience under sail and at anchor unique and unforgettable.

Key Features & HighlightsTechnical Specs:

  • Length: 15.98 m
  • Beam: 8.90 m
  • Draft: 1.80 m
  • Dry Weight: 14,000 kg | Displacement: 32.86 t
  • Engine: Volvo Penta 75 hp (2023), 1279 hours, IntegreL Generator (9kW)
  • Fuel Capacity: 600 l | Water Capacity: 600 l
  • Holding Tanks: 4 x 40 l
  • Flag of Registry: Jersey (VAT Not Paid)

Comfort, Luxury, and Liveaboard Practicality

  • Rare 4 Cabins Version – 4 double cabins and 4 heads/showers, perfect for family, guests, or crew.
  • Massive Living Space – Expansive cockpit, saloon, and comfortable cabins, paired with premium interior finishes and extensive Flexiteek synthetic deck.
  • Neel Premium Pack add-ons: Bow thruster, electrical winches, Sunbrella sundeck cushions, Fusion audio.
  • Owner Upgrades for True Luxury: Dimmable lighting, Bose & Bowers & Wilkins sound systems, ultra-modern galley appliances, 43" Samsung The Frame TV (concealed installation), and more.
  • Air Conditioning & Heating: WEBASTO central reversible air-conditioning for comfort in all climates.

Unmatched Sailing Performance and Safety

  • Sails: INCIDENCE Hydranet sails (main, genoa, self-tacking and removable jib), ISTEC Parasailor, North Sails Code 0, asymmetrical spinnaker—versatile and robust sail plan for all conditions.
  • Helm Ergonomics: Direct access from cockpit, bimini with full closing tent, upgraded bow seats, cockpit galley for alfresco entertaining.

Electronics & Navigation

  • State-of-the-Art Navigation: 2x B&G Zeus 3S chartplotters, Simrad autopilot with dual control stations, radar, log-speedometer, depth, wind instruments, and fully integrated Lumishore RGBW underwater lights.
  • Full Connectivity: Pepwave MAX BR1 Pro router with 5G, Starlink satellite internet—reliable connection wherever you go.

Electrical & Energy Systems

  • Massive Solar Power: 4012W from 34 Solbian Flex panels.
  • Lithium Battery Bank: 6 Mastervolt 24/6000 batteries for energy independence.
  • INTEGREL 9kW Generator on Volvo Penta: Auxiliary power for long passages.
  • Multiple Shore Power Options: 230V and 120V inlets for global cruising.

Galley & Interior

  • Professional-Grade Galley: Bosch induction hobs, Panasonic multifunctional oven, Bosch dishwasher, Isotherm fridge/freezer, Franke faucet with filtered water.
  • Laundry Facilities: Bosch washing machine (9kg capacity).
  • Comfort Upgrades: Battened beds, electrical fans in all cabins, extra handrails and lifelines for safety.

Deck, Safety & Outside Living

  • Cockpit Innovations: Removable tent with mosquito panels, bimini at helm, deck handrails, stanchions raised for additional safety, steps lighting, underwater lights.
  • Tender Package: Highfield 3.4m Alu/Hypalon dinghy with 20hp Honda outboard.
  • Dive Compressor: Bauer dive compressor for underwater adventure.
  • SPADE 37kg Anchor: Upgraded anchor for solid holding in all conditions.
  • Pre-Installed Gas Grill port transom.

For discerning sailors seeking a truly turnkey, liveaboard-ready multihull, there is no comparison. Contact us now for full inventory, more information, and to arrange a viewing of this Neel 51 for sale 2023. She’s ready to take you anywhere, in comfort and style.
